gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent Bash implementation using jq for portable date arithmetic (lines 100-136). Script follows best practices (set -euo pipefail, getopts). Workflow is well-structured with least-privilege permissions and thorough test cases covering JSON/Markdown formats and error handling.
